column9:
Guide:
1. This method is based on you crafting your own core alloys at the cheapest possible 
price as you can see to the left,
and then use the core alloys to craft as many as you can of the 
Proficient Blacksmith's Hammer with full resourcefulness tool + enchant resourcefulness.
2. After that you simply just disenchant all your Hammer's with a Best in Slot Blood Elf Disenchanter. 
You need full Disenchanting spec and ALL skillpoints you can get.
3. Then sell your storm dust as it is or use them in further crafts for even more profit :) GL!
